title: Wildfire — Northern California
description: A fast-moving wildfire has prompted evacuation orders for three counties in Northern California. Residents are advised to leave immediately.

title: Hurricane Warning — Florida Coast
description: Category 3 hurricane approaching the Florida coast. Coastal areas under mandatory evacuation.

title: Earthquake — Tokyo Region
description: Magnitude 6.2 earthquake struck near Tokyo. Minor damage reported, tsunami warning issued.

title: Flooding — Bangladesh
description: Heavy monsoon rains have caused severe flooding in multiple districts. Thousands displaced.

title: Severe Storm — Sydney
description: Severe thunderstorm warning in effect. Heavy rain and strong winds expected through evening.

title: Heat Advisory — Phoenix
description: Excessive heat warning issued. Temperatures expected to reach 115°F. Stay hydrated and avoid outdoor activities.

title: Air Quality Alert — Delhi
description: Poor air quality due to seasonal pollution. Sensitive groups should limit outdoor exposure.

title: Winter Weather Advisory — Oslo
description: Light snow expected overnight. Roads may be slippery during morning commute.
